The stock closed at $577.22 on Thursday, June 18, 2026, down 12.4% year-to-date and 16.77% ... Veteran Tech Investor: Meta Is ‘One of the Best Advertising Machines Ever Built’ With 46% Upside

headline: Morningstar Says SpaceX Could Be Worth Less Than Half Its $1.75 Trillion IPO Price
summary: One of the most anticipated public offerings in recent memory is drawing skepticism. SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) currently has a valuation of roughly $2.44 trillion, up nearly 40% from its $1.75 trillion IPO. Morningstar analysts have signaled the stock could be worth less than half that figure on a fundamentals basis. That gap was the centerpiece of a recent segment on ...
